# [Clang] preprocessor assertion failure after parse errors involving decltype

**Author:** YuchangSu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/184324
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-03T15:21:17Z

## Body

Code:
```CPP
a decltype ]b
```

This regression since Clang-22

Assertion:
```
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Lex/PPCaching.cpp:151: void clang::Preprocessor::AnnotatePreviousCachedTokens(const clang::Token&): Assertion `CachedTokens[CachedLexPos-1].getLastLoc() == Tok.getAnnotationEndLoc() && "The annotation should be until the most recent cached token"' failed.
```

Backtrace:
